subject: english
learning_objectives: Recognise commonly misspelt words from the source list
Improve visual familiarity with difficult spellings
Apply correct spelling in written work

sections.heading: Study List
sections.content: Examples from the note include: amnesia, argument, wholesome, nitty-gritty, nincompoop, garrulous, neophyte, dementia, dilemma, omelette, novelette, pedophilia, gallivant, cathedral, catholicism, dysfunctional, kow-tow, hypochondria, shenanigan, hermaphrodite, propitiation, reincarnation, curtain, paroxysm, parochial, anthropology, misanthrope, misogamist, martyr, chameleon, hyena, cheetah, chimpanzee, champagne, concoction, autopsy, archaeologist, archaic, archaism, phlegmatic, fecundity, brouhaha, brassiere, bazaar, bastardization, lacuna, laconic, synchronization, synthesize.

sections.heading: Practice Focus
sections.content: Learners are expected to study the listed words carefully, note repeated error patterns, and reproduce the spellings accurately in exercises and assignments.
